forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northerly in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the west in the morning. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers near the eastern border, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 20 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 21.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 25.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Hawker in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 21.
Sun protection 12:10pm to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Streaky Bay in the evening. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm at night. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h tending northwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the far west, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwest to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 27.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending west to southwesterly during the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 22 to 29.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 30 to 45 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 29.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
